title: SetVar Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub SetVar (VarName As String, Value as Object)
parameters:
VarName	The name of
		 the SPEL+ global preserve variable.

Value	The new value.
description: Sets the value of a SPEL+ global preserve variable in the Controller.
notes: You can use SetVar to set the values for single variables and array variables. See the examples below.
examples:
Dim i, myArray(10) As Integer
For i = 1 To 10 myArray(i) = i
Next i
m_spel.SetVar("g_myIntArray", myArray)
m_spel.SetVar("g_myIntArray(1)", myArray(1))
